macos.cacheContainsMoved: Some runs contain moved photos or active restore records.
macos.removeCacheMessage: This removes thumbnails, manifests, and other generated data from previous runs. Original source photos are not touched.
macos.removeCacheMovedMessage: Some previous runs contain moved rejected photos or the records required to restore them. Removing these runs can remove recoverable copies or make custom-destination files impossible to restore automatically.
macos.scanFailed: The scan could not be completed.
macos.reviewLoadFailed: The review could not be loaded.
macos.bestQuality: Best quality in this near-duplicate stack.
macos.uncertainSimilarity: Similarity is uncertain; inspect before rejecting.
macos.qualityTie: Close quality result; inspect before rejecting.
macos.duplicate: High-confidence near duplicate with a better frame in this stack.
macos.previewUnavailable: The source image is unavailable or unsupported.
macos.moveConfirmMessage: The app will copy each rejected asset and its sidecars into this run folder, verify every copied size, and only then remove the source files. The moved files remain recoverable until you delete them yourself.
macos.moveSelectionSummary: {count} rejected assets are ready to move.
macos.restoreConfirmMessage: The original card or source folder must be connected. Files will be copied back to their recorded original paths, verified, and then removed from the move destination.
macos.sourceUnavailableMove: The original source is not available. Reconnect the card or folder and try again.
macos.moveFailed: Some rejected files could not be moved.
macos.decisionFailed: The decision could not be saved.
macos.selectRunFolder: Select a run folder containing manifest.json
macos.existingRunMovesWithDirectory: Changing this location also moves the currently open run after a short delay.
macos.getStartedSubtitle: Find the strongest frames while keeping every decision visible.
macos.noRecentRunsDetail: Start a scan or open a completed run folder.
macos.selectPhotosMessage: Select a photo folder or a folder on a mounted SD card.
macos.selectRunMessage: Select a result folder containing manifest.json.
macos.selectResultsMessage: New run folders will be created inside this directory.
macos.selectMoveDestinationMessage: Rejected photos will be copied and verified here before their source copies are removed.
macos.cacheScopeDetail: Removing a selected run deletes its entire run folder, including previews, reports, and rejected photos stored inside it. Source photos, app settings, and files moved to an external custom destination are not deleted.
macos.noPreviousRuns: No removable run folders were found.
macos.estimatedSystemLoad: Estimated load for this quality setting
macos.tutorialScanBody: Choose a local folder or mounted card. The scan reads source photos and writes a separate run folder.
macos.tutorialSuggestionsBody: Keep, reject, and review states are filled in for you. Quality bars make close frames easy to compare.
macos.tutorialInspectBody: Open a frame to zoom, pan, navigate its stack, and change the synchronized Keep control.
macos.tutorialMoveBody: Moving rejects is separate and confirmed. Files are copied, verified, journaled, and remain restorable.
macos.counterpartCardHelp: Apply this run's decisions to a RAW or JPEG counterpart card
macos.selectCounterpartCardMessage: Select the photo folder on the currently mounted RAW or JPEG card.
macos.counterpartStemRule: Files are matched by case-insensitive filename stem; folders may differ.
macos.counterpartRunConflicts: Duplicate stems in the original run for {count}: {stems}
macos.counterpartMoveConfirmMessage: The app will copy and verify each matched opposite-format file and its sidecars before removing it from this card. Unmatched or ambiguous stems will not be changed.
macos.counterpartRestoreConfirmTitle: Restore files to this counterpart card?
macos.counterpartRestoreConfirmMessage: Choose the same counterpart card used for the move. Files will be restored to their recorded relative folders after verification.

staticWeb.title: Burst Frame Deduplicator
staticWeb.description: Cull burst photos without losing control.
staticWeb.saveModalSubtitle: Export your decisions or apply the rejected-file move.
staticWeb.noImages: No supported photos were found in this folder.
staticWeb.scanFailed: The browser scan could not be completed.
staticWeb.rawIsolation: RAW decoding needs cross-origin isolation. Reload this page after the service worker activates.
staticWeb.rawDecodeFailed: RAW preview could not be decoded.
staticWeb.unsupportedSkipped: Some files could not be decoded and were skipped.
staticWeb.best_quality: Best quality in this near-duplicate stack.
staticWeb.uncertain_similarity: Similarity is uncertain; inspect before rejecting.
staticWeb.quality_tie: Close quality result; inspect before rejecting.
staticWeb.high_confidence_duplicate: High-confidence near duplicate with a better frame in this stack.
staticWeb.movedReason: Moved out of the source folder. It can be restored during this review session.
staticWeb.fileAccessUnsupported: This browser cannot write local folders. Export the review or use the displayed script instead.
staticWeb.writableSourceRequired: Choose the source with the folder picker in a browser that supports read-write folder access before moving files.
staticWeb.moveConfirm: Move {count} rejected asset(s)? Each grouped asset is copied and verified before its originals are removed.
staticWeb.restoreConfirm: Restore {count} moved asset(s) to their original folders?
staticWeb.movedResult: Moved {files} file(s) from {assets} asset(s). Failed assets: {failed}.
staticWeb.restoredResult: Restored {files} file(s) from {assets} asset(s). Failed assets: {failed}.
staticWeb.originalPathOccupied: The original path already contains a file
staticWeb.destinationExists: The destination already contains a file
staticWeb.copyVerificationFailed: The copied file size did not match the source.
staticWeb.sourceUnavailableMove: The source file is unavailable. Reconnect the card or folder and try again.
staticWeb.permissionRequired: Read-write folder permission is required for this operation.
staticWeb.sourceUnavailable: This preview is no longer available. Select the folder again.
staticWeb.aboutDescription: Cull burst photos without losing control. Photos stay on this device while you compare suggestions and make the final decisions.
staticWeb.tutorialScanBody: A real scan stays on this device. This tour uses fake frames and does not read any files.
staticWeb.tutorialSuggestionsBody: Keep boxes are already set. Compare the quiet quality bars and leave close calls for review.
staticWeb.tutorialInspectBody: Open a frame to zoom, pan, navigate the stack, and update Keep without leaving the preview.
staticWeb.tutorialMoveBody: Rejected files move only after confirmation and verification. Exported decisions remain available either way.

reviewWeb.title: Burst Review
reviewWeb.closeCall: Close call; inspect before moving rejects.
reviewWeb.duplicate: High-confidence near duplicate with a better frame in this stack.
reviewWeb.movedReason: Moved out of the source folder. It can be restored from this run.
reviewWeb.best: Best quality in this near-duplicate stack.
reviewWeb.noMatches: No frames match the current filter.
reviewWeb.similarity: Nearest visual distance {distance} (subject {subject}, scene {scene}); duplicate confidence {confidence}.
reviewWeb.previewUnavailable: Preview image could not be loaded. The source path may be inaccessible or unsupported.
reviewWeb.saveDone: Review files saved in the run directory.
reviewWeb.saveModalSubtitle: The review files are saved. Export the decisions or apply the rejected-file move below.
reviewWeb.runFolderDefault: Default: a recoverable folder inside this run
reviewWeb.restoreConfirm: Restore {count} moved asset(s) to their original paths? The original card or source folder must be connected.
reviewWeb.moveSourceUnavailable: The source folder is unavailable. Reconnect the card or folder before moving rejected photos.
reviewWeb.restoreSourceUnavailable: The original source folder is unavailable. Reconnect it before restoring moved photos.
reviewWeb.restored: Restored {files} file(s) from {assets} asset(s). Missing: {missing}. Failed: {failed}.
reviewWeb.previewSourceUnavailable: The original or moved image is unavailable. Reconnect the source card or restore the move destination.
reviewWeb.rawDecodeFailed: The RAW preview could not be decoded.
reviewWeb.moveConfirm:
Move {count} rejected asset(s) to the selected local destination?

This copies and verifies every file in each asset group before removing the originals from the source card or folder. The move remains restorable from this review run.
reviewWeb.aboutDescription: A local review workspace for burst-photo suggestions. The CLI backend serves this page without uploading your photos.
reviewWeb.tutorialScanBody: The CLI analyzed the source and wrote this local run. This tour uses fake frames and changes nothing.
reviewWeb.tutorialSuggestionsBody: Keep boxes are preselected. Compare quality and explanations, then override only the frames that need it.
reviewWeb.tutorialInspectBody: Open a thumbnail to zoom, pan, navigate the stack, and update Keep from the full preview.
reviewWeb.tutorialMoveBody: Moving rejects is confirmed, verified, and journaled. You can restore moved groups from this run.
